description: Move-in Ready Lottery Home with Elevator! Welcome to Fox & Aikins North, an exclusive collection of 42 sophisticated townhomes, proudly designed and built by award-winning Park Ridge Homes. This CORNER UNIT features 4 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, a spacious fenced backyard, & TWO decks. Kitchen is equipped with a 5-burner gas range, French door refrigerator, and dishwasher. Additional highlights include a heated tile ensuite, iFlow gas furnace system, Navien tankless hot water heater, plus A/C. Located in the desirable Grandview Heights area, just steps from the new Ta'talu Elementary, and walking distance to shops at MC/Grandview Corners, plus minutes to Hwy 99, White Rock Beach, and the US border. Now open by appointment only.
